user_authority_cn: Grok 是贵大脑：普通事务 CodexA 自决+子代理；仅整项目终末验收或 A 真拿不动才唤醒 Grok。子阶段不段审。禁止 idle handoff 冻结等我。

already_landed_by_grok_delivery_only.note: Grok 已落策略+ingress 读模型补丁；A 须验收、补全 workflow/hook/DAG 真续派，不得当完成。

root_cause_cn: worker 终态 + next_ready 空 + auto_continue=true → 机器误判已停 → 默认 idle handoff 敲 Grok；DAG CR-W0~W8 收口过早未写 W90/合并/fanout 后续节点。
must_do: continue_same_task same workflow; CodexA brain owns next beat — NOT Grok scheduler
Read grok_escalation_policy.v1.json: default_wake_grok_on_idle=false; orchestrator self-continue rank before Grok

When ORCHESTRATOR_NEXT_READY_REQUIRED: brain reconcile assignment → append next_ready nodes (W90 DP merge, parallel_fanout reconcile, E-repo apply_patch); summon parallel subagents for next-phase direction audit
Temporal same-workflow auto_continue_same_task dispatch implementation worker; do NOT wait Grok leg2

Patch B repo: scripts/codex_lifecycle_hook_guard.ps1 + scripts/Send-CodexIdleHandoffToGrok.ps1 — idle handoff only if explicit_grok_escalation or phase_exit_waiting_grok_segment_audit or CODEX_BRAIN_CANNOT_DECIDE

Patch temporal_codex_task_workflow + advance_assignment_dag_after_worker_result.ps1: post_worker closeout must leave next_ready OR honest ORCHESTRATOR_* blocker; forbid silent empty next_ready when auto_continue=true
Re-run observation-snapshot for task: expect 待编排续派 + idle_handoff_gate.required=false for ordinary idle
acceptance_cn: ordinary worker terminal → CodexA auto-continues without Grok TUI ping
idle_handoff only with explicit escalation marker
assignment next_ready repopulated for remaining CR/SeedCortex work
parallel_fanout or honest blocker; DP drafts merge path or blocker landed

parallel_dispatch_decision.reason_cn: 编排自续+hook/workflow 焊接；子代理并行研究下阶段
parallel_dispatch_decision.next_machine_action_cn: WORKER_ASSIGNMENT: orchestrator reconcile + hook/workflow patch + continue worker

grok_role_boundary: delivery_only_not_executor; no further Grok code edits unless user asks
